'''nazama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecum|cecum]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecum|cecum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nazama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næzæmæth|næzæmæth]] || [[word:næzæmæj|næzæmæj]] || [[word:næzæmæsh|næzæmæsh]] || [[word:næzæmæ|næzæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazazamath|nazazamath]] || [[word:nazazamaj|nazazamaj]] || [[word:nazazamash|nazazamash]] || [[word:nazazama|nazazama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazamath|nazamath]] || [[word:nazamaj|nazamaj]] || [[word:nazamash|nazamash]] || [[word:nazama|nazama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazafmath|nazafmath]] || [[word:nazafmaj|nazafmaj]] || [[word:nazafmash|nazafmash]] || [[word:nazafmaf|nazafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nazamatha|nazamatha]] || [[word:nazamaja|nazamaja]] || [[word:nazamasha|nazamasha]] || [[word:nazamaka|nazamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nazamath|nazamath]] || [[word:nazamaj|nazamaj]] || [[word:nazamash|nazamash]] || [[word:nazama|nazama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nazamathal|nazamathal]] || [[word:nazamajal|nazamajal]] || [[word:nazamashal|nazamashal]] || [[word:nazamakal|nazamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nazamathatha|nazamathatha]] || [[word:nazamajaja|nazamajaja]] || [[word:nazamashasha|nazamashasha]] || [[word:nazamaka|nazamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nazamathan|nazamathan]] || [[word:nazamajan|nazamajan]] || [[word:nazamashan|nazamashan]] || [[word:nazamakan|nazamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nazamathaoro|nazamathaoro]] || [[word:nazamajaoro|nazamajaoro]] || [[word:nazamashaoro|nazamashaoro]] || [[word:nazamakaoro|nazamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
